main_post.text:
🔍 BitNet on Android: First Public Lab Release

Sunwood-ai-labs just shipped bitnet-android-lab v0.1.0—the first reproducible public lab kit for running QVAC Fabric BitNet LoRA experiments on real Android hardware.

🎯 What's Inside:
• Termux-side helper scripts for fine-tuning & inference
• Minimal Android-specific Vulkan patches
• Sanitized evidence with dated rerun snippets
• Split monitoring: Termux TUIs + Windows adb watcher

📊 Scope Notes:
This release documents ONE real device with explicit caveats. Not a ready-to-run bundle—single-run tok/s references, not benchmark medians.

Why it matters: Evidence-backed claims instead of prose assertions. The repo proves BitNet LoRA can run on consumer Android, with reproducibility as the priority.

$ONIAGI
